region_name: York and North Yorkshire Combined Authority
cluster_name: York and North Yorkshire Clean Energy
strap: York and North Yorkshire Clean Energy draws £1.36bn of UKRI lead-led funding across 1,659 grants, anchored by Leeds (25%), Lancaster University (24%).
behaviour: The cluster shows high-confidence "Re-proving instead of narrowing" and "Forgiving instead of redesigning" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
